originalTitle: Qantas tests new ultra long-range Airbus in 17,000km direct flight from France to Melbourne
summary: Airbus A350–1000ULR becomes most watched plane on flight tracking websites as Qantas tests new aircraft for its Project Sunrise
content: Qantas’s new ultra long-distance aircraft has landed on Australian soil for the first time on Friday after a 19-hour test flight from France. The Airbus A350-1000ULR, designed for Qantas to complete some of the longest commercial flights in the world, set off on a nonstop journey from Airbus’ manufacturing facility Toulouse, France on Thursday, destined for Melbourne. The planes have been designed to fly up to 22 hours nonstop for the company’s Sydney to London direct route, expected to start in October 2027. The test flight has attracted attention from transport enthusiasts, with more than 67,000 people following its almost 17,000km path on flightradar24.com on Friday morning – the most-watched flight globally on Friday. The air traffic website indicates the flight departed Toulouse at 7.33am on Thursday, local time. It landed in Melbourne just over 19 hours later, at 10.46am, local time. In a statement, Qantas said four Airbus flight test pilots and five flight test engineers were operating the model’s test. They and the aircraft will stay in Melbourne over the weekend then depart for Toulouse on Monday, with two Qantas pilots joining them on board. Qantas’ chief technical pilot, Alex Passerini, told Channel Seven on Friday the return flight would take 23 hours, as the crew tested systems from fuel transfer to air conditioning. Passerini said crews would be able to take regular rest breaks on the plane, aligned with the airline’s “data-driven” systems. “Everyone’s going to get tired,” Passerini said. Qantas said the plane in flight was the first of its model to take to the skies. The A350–1000ULR was first flown on 2 June, for three hours 43 minutes over France and the French Atlantic coast, and has since undergone extensive testing. The test model is not carrying Qantas’s official white and red livery. It has a tan exterior carrying company branding, with Qantas logos on its wingtips. The company said the first A350-1000ULR painted in the Qantas livery, named Vega, is still on the assembly line and will be delivered to Qantas in April 2027. The A350–1000ULR’s extra 20,000-litre fuel tank enables it to fly ultra long-haul routes of almost 10,000 nautical miles (18,500km), according to Airbus. Qantas in June said it was buying 12 aircraft with 238 seats rather than the 300-plus seats on other A350-1000 models. Qantas’s Project Sunrise plans for nonstop services between Sydney and London have been delayed multiple times in previous years. In November 2025, the company said the service would start in the first half of 2027, with Airbus set to deliver the first specially configured A350-1000ULR by late 2026. But Airbus in June revealed the first aircraft would be delivered in April 2027, pushing back the start date again. Qantas had previously mentioned Melbourne and Brisbane, along with Sydney, as planned hubs for direct flights to London and New York City. The company’s latest announcement in June did not mention those cities but officials have indicated Qantas would adjust its routes based on customer demand.
chineseTitle: 澳洲航空在从法国飞往墨尔本 17,000 公里的直航中测试新型超远程空客
chineseSummary: 随着澳洲航空为其“日出计划”测试新飞机，空客 A350–1000ULR 成为航班跟踪网站上最受关注的飞机
chineseContent: 澳洲航空的新型超远程飞机在从法国出发进行了 19 小时的试飞后，于周五首次降落在澳大利亚领土上。专为澳洲航空设计的空客 A350-1000ULR 飞机将完成世界上最长的一些商业航班，周四从空客法国图卢兹制造工厂出发，飞往墨尔本。这些飞机设计为该公司悉尼至伦敦直飞航线的飞行时长长达 22 小时，预计将于 2027 年 10 月开始。这次试飞吸引了交通爱好者的关注，周五早上有超过 67,000 人在 Flightradar24.com 上跟随其近 17,000 公里的航线，这是周五全球最受关注的航班。空中交通网站显示，该航班于当地时间周四上午 7 点 33 分从图卢兹起飞。 19个多小时后，当地时间上午10点46分，飞机降落在墨尔本。澳洲航空在一份声明中表示，四名空客飞行测试飞行员和五名飞行测试工程师正在操作该模型的测试。他们和飞机将在墨尔本停留周末，然后于周一飞往图卢兹，两名澳航飞行员将与他们一起登机。澳洲航空首席技术飞行员亚历克斯·帕塞里尼 (Alex Passerini) 周五告诉第七频道，返程航班将需要 23 小时，机组人员正在测试从燃油传输到空调的系统。帕塞里尼表示，机组人员将能够在飞机上定期休息，这与航空公司的“数据驱动”系统保持一致。 “每个人都会感到疲倦，”帕塞里尼说。澳洲航空表示，这架正在飞行的飞机是其型号中第一架飞上天空的飞机。 A350-1000ULR 于 6 月 2 日首飞，在法国和法国大西洋海岸上空飞行了 3 小时 43 分钟，此后进行了广泛的测试。测试机型未搭载Qan
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
